description: Pipefy is a business process automation and orchestration platform for building and managing workflows, forms, portals, and AI-assisted operations. Organizations use it to automate internal service and operational processes across teams such as HR, procurement, finance, IT, and customer support.
summary: Pipefy exposes a primary authenticated GraphQL API at https://api.pipefy.com/graphql, plus an open-source Pipefy CLI and local MCP server in its ai-toolkit; auth is via bearer tokens, service-account client credentials, or CLI login sessions depending on the surface.

packages.runtimeHint: uv tool install or uvx; package name pipefy-cli
